summary: Phase 4 testing complete. All features working correctly: 1) Leads/contact management with read/unread status, 2) Nosotros content editor (mission, vision, values, stats, CTA), 3) User roles system (admin vs editor) with role-based sidebar filtering. Email sending is configured but SMTP not set up - falls back gracefully to DB-only storage.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns token with role field
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns role='admin' for admin user
Backend: POST /api/contacto saves to DB with leido=false
Backend: GET /api/leads requires admin auth (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/leads returns list of contact submissions
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id}/read marks lead as read
Backend: DELETE /api/leads/{id} deletes a lead
Backend: GET /api/nosotros-settings is public (no auth required)
Backend: PUT /api/nosotros-settings requires auth
Backend: PUT /api/nosotros-settings updates content successfully
Backend: GET /api/usuarios requires admin auth
Backend: GET /api/usuarios returns list without password_hash
Backend: POST /api/usuarios creates user with role
Backend: POST /api/usuarios fails for duplicate username (400)
Backend: PUT /api/usuarios/{id} updates user fields including role
Backend: DELETE /api/usuarios/{id} deletes user
Backend: DELETE /api/usuarios/{id} cannot delete yourself (400)
Backend: Editor login returns token with role='editor'
Backend: Editor cannot access /api/leads (403 Forbidden)
Frontend: Admin login successful with admin/admin123
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows Mensajes, Nosotros, Usuarios links
Frontend: AdminLeads page loads with list of contact messages
Frontend: AdminLeads shows read/unread status indicators
Frontend: AdminLeads detail view shows reply email button
Frontend: AdminNosotros page loads with mission, vision fields
Frontend: AdminNosotros has add/remove values functionality
Frontend: AdminNosotros has save button
Frontend: AdminUsuarios page loads with user list
Frontend: AdminUsuarios shows roles explanation section
Frontend: AdminUsuarios new user modal with role selection
Frontend: Editor user sees only Dashboard, Artículos, Actividades in sidebar
Frontend: Editor user does NOT see Empresas, Categorías, Media, Mensajes, Nosotros, Usuarios, Configuración
Frontend: Contact form on /nosotros submits successfully
Frontend: Contact form shows success toast after submission
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: require_admin dependency correctly returns 403 for non-admin users
server.py: create_token includes role in JWT payload
server.py: GET /api/usuarios excludes password_hash from response
AdminLayout.jsx: Role-based sidebar filtering works correctly using JWT payload
AdminLeads.jsx: Clean inbox UI with read/unread indicators and reply email button
AdminNosotros.jsx: Full content editor with mission, vision, values, stats, CTA
AdminUsuarios.jsx: User management with role selection and roles explanation section
Email sending gracefully falls back when SMTP not configured (expected behavior)
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via contact form submissions during testing. Created and deleted test editor users for role-based access testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested and working. Leads management: contact form submissions saved with leido=false, admin can view/mark-read/delete leads. Nosotros editor: admin can edit mission, vision, values, stats, CTA. User roles: admin has full access, editor only sees Dashboard/Artículos/Actividades. Email sending is configured but SMTP credentials are empty in .env - this is expected and the system gracefully falls back to DB-only storage.
mocked_api_note: Email sending is configured but SMTP not set up - falls back gracefully to DB-only storage. This is expected behavior.
